text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The season for the spring Classics is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In other words, the Triple Crown and Triple Tiara
tours. It's truly an important period that only
comes once for each racer. It's critical that we
decide how to spend our precious time.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, are you looking over those documents
again?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Don't you think it's time to clue me in?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have to be extra careful about the races we run
because of the promise I made with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has to take advantage of various
opportunities if she wants to run in the races she's
interested in on top of competing against the
other racers she wants to challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hm? Who could it be?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yoo-hoo! Mayano!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hi, Teio! ♪ What's up? Did you come to play with
me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(This is Tokai Teio. She's Mayano Top Gun's
roommate and an admirer of Student Council
President Symboli Rudolf.)

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, something like that! I actually got this video
from Prez. Here's what she said.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Teio. As you are infatuated with me like a
butterfly is with a flower, you must look not only
at me, but at those surrounding me as well.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
For instance, you could watch Narita Brian race.
But it'd be boring to watch alone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian—a racer who boasts overwhelming
strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Famous for being a Triple Crown champion—that
is, winning every Classic race on the Triple Crown
tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's in the year ahead of Mayano Top Gun, so
there aren't many chances for them to compete
against one another. But if Mayano really
challenges the Classics...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ho ho, look at that! Your trainer wants to watch
too, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! Trainer?! You're not allowed to look at
other girls!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Don't worry about it! You want to see it
too, so we might as well watch it together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we begin watching the video of Narita
Brian's races...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
In the lead is Narita Brian! She's left her
opponents in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What tremendous speed! She's a beast! There's no
contest! She's toppled the other racers and
crossed the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's made it to the fourth corner! She's tearing
out from the pack on the outside!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Does anyone even stand a chance against Brian?!
Here she comes, and she's crossed the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: First is the only place for this racer!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
A race truly befitting a Triple Crown champion!
Narita Brian was absolutely amazing!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian has come up to the press seats! She's
here!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
That was an incredible victory! Did you think this
race was in the bag befo—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Didn't it look that way?

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
O-of course! No one stands a chance against you,
Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So what if I knew I'd win?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I run only for my own satisfaction.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Races are full of those who desire victory.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That's why I crush all of them—to quench my own
thirst.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Next time will be the same.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun and Tokai Teio
Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are sayings regarding each of the G1 races
that form the Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fastest racer wins the Satsuki Sho. The
luckiest racer wins the Japanese Derby. The
strongest racer wins the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Narita Brian's running proves otherwise. Her
phenomenal power makes such sayings seem like
nothing more than supersitions. That's how
incredible she is.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Nothing. I just felt like getting your attention!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun quickly turns back to the
screen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if something would change if she had an
opponent like Narita Brian to face off against in
this year's Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
"Is there any other Umamusume capable of
running like her? Narita Brian takes her first
crown!"

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer, are you still watching Brian's races?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
We don't have to return the video to Teio until
next week, so you don't have to watch it all at
once.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But I can't tear my eyes away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Mayano Top Gun were to have someone like
her as a rival...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's enough! No more watching! Look at me
instead!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: This isn't any fun at all!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you're getting excited right now, aren't
you?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I don't like that! You're my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Watching Brian run isn't supposed to make you
more excited than watching me run!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I know Brian's good!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And I know that if we ran together, it'd be
exciting and I'd twinkle! I already know that!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I knew that even before I debuted.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But now that I have debuted, there's a lot more that I know!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Like, I know that I have what it takes to soar past
her and leave her in my vapor trail someday!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has a point. Even if we can't take her on right
now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The goal of surpassing her must be an incredible
motivator for Mayano Top Gun.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm being serious! I'll be able to beat her in no
time!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And when I do, will you look at me—and me
alone—and say, "You made my heart race"?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And also, "You were twinkly" and "You're the
best"?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Then it's decided!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm being serious! I'm gonna do it! Are you ready?
Do you copy?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She seems full of energy for some reason...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, she sets a new goal for herself—Narita
Brian.
